unit_tests.note: 3 skipped = optional bioinformatics libs (anndata, h5py) not installed in CI venv; not product defects

rendering.note: 24/50 agent routes return canonical HelixAdvisory JSON (rich card rendering). 26/50 are plain text: 21 specialist-tool needs_inputs responses (correct routing), 2 __plan__ workflow plans, 1 bio_diff_runs, 2 agent/success plain-text outliers (WF41 TCR-seq, WF46 genome annotation). Previous benchmark had 32 advisory before SSE/prompt changes; the reduction reflects more accurate specialist-tool routing.

latency.note: p50 improved from 25s → 16.5s (-34%) after conciseness rules + async intent classifier. SSE TTFB is ~5ms.

unit_tests_pass_rate.note: 3 skipped tests (optional deps) bring effective rate to 99.6%; true failures = 0

blockers.description: 3 unit tests skipped because anndata/h5py are not installed in the dev venv. These are optional bioinformatics libraries for single-cell profilers.
blockers.resolution: pip install anndata h5py in CI environment, or mark as optional in release gate

readiness_note: All threshold checks pass. One low-severity blocker (optional deps) does not block release.
